name: Impossible Breakfast Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and crumble the sausage.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Blend all ingredients except cheese and meat in a blender for 15 seconds.
4. Sprinkle the blended mixture with cheese and meat on top of a baking dish.
5. Bake for 45 minutes.
6. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
